FitzRoy.text:
Wind
In south, cyclonic mainly northeasterly 4 to 6, decreasing 3 at times. In north, northeasterly, becoming cyclonic in west, 3 to 5, occasionally 6 at first.
Sea state
In south, very rough at first in west, otherwise rough, but occasionally moderate later in north. in north, very rough at first in west, otherwise moderate or rough.
Weather
In south, thundery showers. In north, rain at times, fog patches.
Visibility
In south, good, occasionally poor. In north, moderate or good, occasionally very poor.
